generated.as:
case
    when "canonical_realm_id" is null or "canonical_realm_version" is null or "canonicalization_version" is null or "canonical_object_kind_id" is null or "canonical_scope_kind" is null or "canonical_external_subject" is null then null
    else encode(
      sha256(
        replace(
          'source-account-canonical-key:v1|' ||
          octet_length("canonical_realm_id")::text || ':' || "canonical_realm_id" || octet_length("canonical_realm_version")::text || ':' || "canonical_realm_version" || octet_length("canonicalization_version")::text || ':' || "canonicalization_version" || octet_length("canonical_object_kind_id")::text || ':' || "canonical_object_kind_id" || case "canonical_scope_kind"
    when 'provider' then '8:provider'
    when 'source_connection' then '17:source_connection'
  end || case
      when "canonical_scope_source_connection_id" is null then '-1:'
      else octet_length("canonical_scope_source_connection_id")::text || ':' || "canonical_scope_source_connection_id"
    end || octet_length("canonical_external_subject")::text || ':' || "canonical_external_subject",
          chr(92),
          chr(92) || chr(92)
        )::bytea
      ),
      'hex'
    )
  end

generated.as:
case message_scope_kind
          when 'provider_thread' then 'provider_thread'
          when 'source_account' then
            'source_account|' || octet_length(message_scope_source_account_id)::text || ':' || message_scope_source_account_id
          when 'source_thread_binding' then
            'source_thread_binding|' || octet_length(message_scope_source_thread_binding_id)::text || ':' || message_scope_source_thread_binding_id
        end

encode(
    sha256(
      replace(
        'external-message-key:v1|' ||
        octet_length("message_realm_id")::text || ':' || "message_realm_id" ||
        octet_length("message_realm_version")::text || ':' || "message_realm_version" ||
        octet_length("message_canonicalization_version")::text || ':' || "message_canonicalization_version" ||
        case "message_scope_kind"
          when 'provider_thread' then '15:provider_thread'
          when 'source_account' then '14:source_account'
          when 'source_thread_binding' then '21:source_thread_binding'
        end ||
        case
      when "message_scope_source_account_id" is null then '-1:'
      else octet_length("message_scope_source_account_id")::text || ':' || "message_scope_source_account_id"
    end ||
        case
      when "message_scope_source_thread_binding_id" is null then '-1:'
      else octet_length("message_scope_source_thread_binding_id")::text || ':' || "message_scope_source_thread_binding_id"
    end ||
        octet_length("message_object_kind_id")::text || ':' || "message_object_kind_id" ||
        octet_length("external_thread_id")::text || ':' || "external_thread_id" ||
        octet_length("canonical_external_subject")::text || ':' || "canonical_external_subject",
        chr(92),
        chr(92) || chr(92)
      )::bytea
    ),
    'hex'
  )
